generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100FirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder for position measurement on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder for position measurement on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for motor current I_M on first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
]

instance PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Position angle data from motor and secondary encoders"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity data derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration data derived from position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current I_M data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, input current I_M, output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, torque τ_G"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot, torque τ_out"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for axis control"
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Stribeck friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for Dahl friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink simulation model for LuGre friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for continuous model refinement during operation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML tool for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for real-time data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for integrated data"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time friction model identification using Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, SimulatedVsMeasuredComparisonInsight
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization dashboard for integrated data including current, position, velocity, acceleration, and torque"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through model-based control updates"
    DTDFVocab:provides MotionAccuracyAction
]

instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction parameters identified for updating control algorithms"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrated data visualization for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance SimulatedVsMeasuredComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights derived from comparison of simulated and measured data for friction modeling"
]

instance MotionAccuracyAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Update control algorithms to improve motion accuracy based on friction parameters"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time processing with continuous data streaming and synchronization for live monitoring and model updating."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of physical robot sensors, MQTT data streaming, SysML/Simulink models, processing components for friction identification, and unified dashboard for visualization, all focused on the first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated, utilizing live operational data during robot motion for continuous friction model refinement."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated vs measured data deviations; multi-physics-aware friction model identification with white-box and black-box models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data transmission from sensors to digital shadow processing components."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards for modeling and data representation."
]
